strategy_used:
1. Go to the drawer.
2. Open the drawer.
3. Examine the contents of the drawer (ITERATIVE-PROMPTING: Ensure there is no pencil inside).
4. If a pencil is not found, go to the location of the pencil.
5. Pick up the pencil.
6. Go back to the drawer.
7. Put the pencil in the drawer.
8. Close the drawer.
